requirement.description: The ECM shall transmit the current vehicle speed on the CAN bus.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

ECM_SPEED_CAN_ID = 0x200
MIN_MSG_COUNT = 8
SCALE = 0.1
COLLECTION_TIMEOUT = 2.0

def simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, speed_kmh: float):
    """Stimulation handled externally (CAPL/HIL). Placeholder for logic flow."""
    return

def collect_speed_messages(bus: can.Bus, duration_sec: float = 1.0):
    end_time = time.time() + duration_sec
    messages = []
    while time.time() < end_time:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.1)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == ECM_SPEED_CAN_ID:
            messages.append(msg)
    return messages

def decode_vehicle_speed(data_bytes: bytes) -> float:
    if len(data_bytes) < 2:
        raise ValueError("Invalid CAN payload length")
    raw = int.from_bytes(data_bytes[0:2], byteorder="little", signed=False)
    return round(raw * SCALE, 1)

@pytest.fixture(scope="session")
def can_bus():
    interface = os.getenv("CAN_INTERFACE", "socketcan")
    channel = os.getenv("CAN_CHANNEL", "can0")
    bitrate = int(os.getenv("CAN_BITRATE", "500000"))
    bus = can.Bus(interface=interface, channel=channel, bitrate=bitrate)
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

test_cases.title: Stationary Vehicle Speed
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_001_speed_zero(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 0)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    assert len(msgs) >= MIN_MSG_COUNT
    assert all(decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) == 0.0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Low Speed Verification
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_002_speed_10(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 10)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    assert msgs
    assert all(abs(decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) - 10.0) <= 0.1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Medium Speed Verification
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_003_speed_50(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 50)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    assert msgs
    assert all(abs(decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) - 50.0) <= 0.1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: High Speed Verification
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_004_speed_100(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 100)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    assert all(abs(decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) - 100.0) <= 0.1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Very High Speed Verification
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_005_speed_200(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 200)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    assert all(abs(decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) - 200.0) <= 0.1 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Maximum Allowed Speed
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_006_speed_300(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 300)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    assert any(decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) == 300.0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Speed Increase Transition
test_cases.expected_result: Vehicle_Speed updates from 0 km/h to 50 km/h
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_007_ramp_up(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 0)
    time.sleep(0.5)
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 50)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    speeds = [decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 0.0 in speeds and 50.0 in speeds
    assert speeds.index(50.0) > speeds.index(0.0)

test_cases.title: Speed Decrease Transition
test_cases.expected_result: Vehicle_Speed updates correctly from 80 km/h to 20 km/h
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_008_ramp_down(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 80)
    time.sleep(0.5)
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 20)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    speeds = [decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert 80.0 in speeds and 20.0 in speeds
    assert speeds.index(20.0) > speeds.index(80.0)

test_cases.title: Constant Speed Stability
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_009_stability(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 60)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    values = [decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) for m in msgs]
    assert len(values) >= 10
    assert all(v == 60.0 for v in values)

test_cases.title: Transmission Periodicity
test_cases.expected_result: Multiple frames received continuously during period
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_010_periodicity(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 40)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 10

test_cases.title: Over-speed Cap Verification
steps: Attempt to set vehicle speed to 350 km/h
test_cases.expected_result: Vehicle_Speed value does not exceed 300.0 km/h
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_011_no_overflow(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 350)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    assert all(decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) <= 300.0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Scaling Verification
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_012_scaling(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 100)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    assert msgs
    raw = int.from_bytes(msgs[0].data[0:2], byteorder="little")
    assert raw == 1000
    assert (raw * SCALE) == 100.0

test_cases.title: Correct CAN ID Verification
steps: Set vehicle speed to valid value
test_cases.expected_result: Vehicle_Speed signal is present only in CAN ID 0x200

test_cases.title: Ignition OFF Stop Transmission
test_cases.expected_result: No ECM_Vehicle_Speed messages transmitted after OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_014_ignition_off(can_bus):
    # Stimulate ignition OFF externally
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert len(msgs) == 0

test_cases.title: Payload Integrity Check
test_cases.expected_result: All frames contain consistent value 70.0 km/h
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_vs_015_payload_integrity(can_bus):
    simulate_vehicle_speed(can_bus, 70)
    msgs = collect_speed_messages(can_bus, COLLECTION_TIMEOUT)
    assert len(msgs) >= 20
    assert all(decode_vehicle_speed(m.data) == 70.0 for m in msgs)
